paper_title: Drama-based role play activities to impact on students' speaking performance

entities.description: First author of the study from An Giang University
Second author of the study from Can Tho University
University located in Vietnam where Do Thi Ngoc Nhi is affiliated
University located in Vietnam where Nguyen Buu Huan is affiliated

entities.id: English as a Foreign Language (EFL) Education
entities.description: The main field of study focusing on teaching English to non-native speakers
An instructional technique where students engage in acting out roles in specific scenarios
A research design combining quantitative and qualitative data collection and analysis
Statistical analysis including descriptive statistics, independent samples, and paired samples t-tests
Assessment instruments used to measure speaking performance before and after treatment
The oral production of language in real-time or authentic contexts
The ability to manage interaction, negotiate meaning, and maintain conversations
The perspective and feelings of learners toward a specific teaching method
Numerical data collected from the Vietnamese Standardized Test of English Proficiency
The average speaking performance score of the experimental group after the study
The specific score for the interactive communication sub-criterion in the treatment group
Statistical significance level for the improvement in the experimental group
Statistical significance level for the gain in interactive communication specifically
